name: Kimchi Integration Chunks 5-7
description: Complete the remaining Kimchi provider integration work: fix SSE parser handling for Kimchi error events and reasoning_content, build a metadata poller with DB persistence and API route, and add combo-engine filtering so unroutable Kimchi models are skipped.

goal.answer: Complete the remaining Kimchi provider integration work: fix SSE parser handling for Kimchi error events and reasoning_content, build a metadata poller with DB persistence and API route, and add combo-engine filtering so unroutable Kimchi models are skipped.

criteria.answer:
open-sse/handlers/sseParser.ts handles Kimchi error-only SSE events and interleaved reasoning_content without losing diagnostics or empty-response detection
A kimchiMetadataPoller service exists and periodically refreshes Kimchi model availability into a new SQLite table
An authenticated API route exposes the persisted Kimchi metadata and triggers on-demand refresh
The combo routing engine filters Kimchi candidates whose upstream model is marked unroutable/unavailable
The existing tests/unit/kimchi-provider.test.ts suite continues to pass (or new failures are justified)
TypeScript typecheck and lint pass on all touched files

constraints.answer: Follow existing OmniRoute patterns: DB modules in src/lib/db/, API routes in src/app/api/, services in open-sse/services/, Do not invent provider counts, file counts, or undocumented API paths, Use Zod for API input validation, Sanitize errors with buildErrorBody / sanitizeErrorMessage, Do not commit secrets or real Cast AI credentials

phases.answer: kimchi, Build Kimchi metadata poller and DB table, Add API route for Kimchi metadata, Combo filter for unroutable Kimchi models, Verify and close

assumptions.answer: Kimchi upstream model list is available at GET https://llm.kimchi.dev/openai/v1/models and requires the same Stainless SDK headers; A model is 'unroutable' when the latest metadata refresh did not include it or explicitly marked it unavailable; The existing tests/unit/kimchi-provider.test.ts defines the expected provider behavior; new tests may be added but existing ones must not regress; No global middleware changes are needed; route-specific auth patterns apply

phases.name: kimchi
phases.goal: Update sseParser.ts to correctly surface Kimchi error events and preserve reasoning_content in the parsed non-streaming response.

steps.description: Inspect current sseParser.ts handling of error events and reasoning_content

result.stderr: Worker Agent timed out twice on a simple read-only inspection task (60s and 157s durations, 1-2 tool uses each, no output). Agent infrastructure appears unable to complete the step. Cannot delegate implementation when read-only workers cannot finish.

steps.description: Add Kimchi-specific error-event handling and reasoning_content preservation
Run lint and typecheck on sseParser.ts

phases.name: Build Kimchi metadata poller and DB table
phases.goal: Create a poller service, DB module, and migration for persisting Kimchi upstream model availability metadata.

steps.description: Design and add SQLite migration for kimchi_model_metadata table
Create src/lib/db/kimchiMetadata.ts DB module with CRUD + last-polled tracking
Create open-sse/services/kimchiMetadataPoller.ts with fetch + persist logic

phases.name: Add API route for Kimchi metadata
phases.goal: Expose a route to read and refresh the persisted Kimchi metadata.

steps.description: Wire poller into existing model sync or scheduler hooks

phases.name: Combo filter for unroutable Kimchi models
phases.goal: Modify combo candidate resolution to skip Kimchi models that the metadata table marks as unavailable.

steps.description: Identify candidate filter point in combo.ts or buildAutoCandidates
Add Kimchi metadata availability check to candidate filtering
Verify typecheck on combo.ts and related modules

phases.name: Verify and close
phases.goal: Run lint, typecheck, and the Kimchi unit tests to confirm the integration.

verification.command: npx eslint open-sse/handlers/sseParser.ts src/lib/db/kimchiMetadata.ts open-sse/services/kimchiMetadataPoller.ts src/app/api/providers/kimchi/metadata/route.ts open-sse/services/combo.ts

goal: Complete the remaining Kimchi provider integration work: fix SSE parser handling for Kimchi error events and reasoning_content, build a metadata poller with DB persistence and API route, and add combo-engine filtering so unroutable Kimchi models are skipped.
successCriteria: open-sse/handlers/sseParser.ts handles Kimchi error-only SSE events and interleaved reasoning_content without losing diagnostics or empty-response detection
A kimchiMetadataPoller service exists and periodically refreshes Kimchi model availability into a new SQLite table
An authenticated API route exposes the persisted Kimchi metadata and triggers on-demand refresh
The combo routing engine filters Kimchi candidates whose upstream model is marked unroutable/unavailable
The existing tests/unit/kimchi-provider.test.ts suite continues to pass (or new failures are justified)
TypeScript typecheck and lint pass on all touched files

Do not invent provider counts, file counts, or undocumented API paths
Use Zod for API input validation
